problem: Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal?
hypothesis: Neuroinflammation reduction via microglial targeting may resolve Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 34 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
